notes.goals: Two matches played. Assists and saves tables will fill in as official match data is compiled — check back after each matchday.
notes.assists: Assist tracking begins once official tournament stats are compiled for Matchday 1. Known so far: Hwang In-beom (Feyenoord) and Lee Kang-in (Mallorca) assisted South Korea's goals; Vladimír Coufal's (West Ham) long throw set up Czechia's.
notes.saves: Goalkeeper save totals will appear once official Matchday 1 stats are published.
